overview: Classic Tic-Tac-Toe — get three in a row to win! Best of 5 rounds (first to 3 wins the match).

phases.name: Your Turn
phases.desc: Place your mark (X or O) on any empty cell.

phases.name: Round End
phases.desc: If someone gets 3 in a row (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal), they score a point. If the board is full with no winner, it's a draw.

phases.name: Match End
phases.desc: First player to win 3 rounds wins the match.

winConditions: Get three of your marks in a row (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal) to win a round.
First to 3 round wins takes the match.
tips: The center cell is the strongest opening move.
Try to set up 'forks' — two ways to win at once.
Watch your opponent's moves and block their lines.
